name: First State Bank
description_short: Farnam, NE branch of First State Bank at 222 Main St serves local banking needs for Northeast Nebraska residents.
description_long:
First State Bank's Farnam, NE location is situated at 222 Main St in the center of this rural Harlan County community. As a full-service bank branch, this standalone office provides Farnam residents direct access to in-person banking services. While specific hours are not publicly listed online, visitors are encouraged to call ahead or stop by during typical business hours to confirm availability.

This Farnam branch offers standard banking services including account opening, loan applications, and cash deposits and withdrawals. For account inquiries or to schedule an appointment, Farnam residents should contact the branch directly. The team at this location can assist with personal and business banking needs typical to rural Northeast Nebraska communities.

For Farnam residents seeking convenient local banking, First State Bank's downtown location puts essential services within walking distance of Main St. Bring a valid ID and recent address verification for account services. This branch serves as a trusted banking option for the Farnam community.
